Bay Port is an unincorporated community in Huron County, Michigan. It was settled in 1851 and the post office was located there in 1872. Bay Port is on the shores of Saginaw Bay within Lake Huron, and during the first full weekend of August, Bay Port hosts its annual Fish Sandwich Festival.

Of the 8 ships that sank on Lake Huron the Carruthers was the only one that hadn’t been found so now all 8 ships that sank on Lake Huron during this storm have been found.

8 of the 12 ships that were lost with all hands sank on Lake Huron. The largest ship lost in this storm was the James Carruthers which was a Canadian freighter that was built earlier in 1913 so she was brand new!
